title: SOPHIAS face landmarks schema
description: Schema for frame-level facial landmark coordinates extracted from a video stream during the SOPHIAS face-processing pipeline. This schema can be used for landmarks extracted from the presenter-view webcam video or from the eye-tracker scene video. Each record represents one facial landmark point detected in one video frame.

Frame.description: Sequential frame index in the processed video stream.

Point_ID.description: Identifier of the facial landmark point within the detected face. The same point identifier is used consistently across frames for the landmark set returned by the face-detection pipeline.

X.description: Horizontal coordinate of the facial landmark point in the video frame.

Y.description: Vertical coordinate of the facial landmark point in the video frame.
